title: Sable: Weighted - Add-On Bundle
description: Comprehensive Sable Physics compatibility for various mods
body:
Adds full block physics weighting for the following mods (and more coming!) when using the Sable physics system:
- Applied Energistics 2
- Ender.io
- Create:
  - Bells & Whistles
  - Connected
  - Crafts & Additions
  - Diesel Generators
  - Encased
  - Gears n' Kinetics
  - Teleporters

To minimize bloat as much as possible, I've only included blocks that made sense to have custom definitions. While this technically omits the undefined blocks from having physics in a free state, said blocks adhere to the principles of which blocks would have a default weight/volume values.

---

**Installation:**
Simply place this mod jar inside your `mods` folder
